title: Coord task-ledger event
description: One append-only line in board/tasks.jsonl. Task state is event-sourced: the current state of a task id is the fold of all of its events (see _fold_tasks). `desc`/`deps` appear on the add-task event; claim/complete/reap events carry the new status and owner.

ts.description: Epoch seconds when this event was appended.

id.description: Task id this event applies to.

desc.description: Human-readable description (present on the add-task event).

deps.description: Task ids that must be 'done' before this task can be claimed (present on the add-task event).

status.description: Task status after applying this event.

claimed_by.description: Session that owns the task after this event, or null when open/unclaimed.

claimed_at_version.description: desired-state version at the moment of claim (present on the claim event); enables detecting silently-stale work.

verify.description: Shell command string that must exit 0 to accept the task (present on the add-task event).

max_attempts.description: Max failed verify attempts before the task is escalated as a blocker (present on the add-task event).

attempts.description: Number of failed verify attempts so far (present on a failing verify event).

verified.description: Whether the last verify run passed (present on a verify event).
